examples.text: On top of that, for a while after birth, it also contains antibodies and proteins that protect us from infections and regulate our immune system.
examples.explanation: 此外，出生后的一段时间内，它还会含有抗体和蛋白质，这些成分能保护我们免受感染，并调节我们的免疫系统。

reviewSessions.example_text: On top of that, for a while after birth, it also contains antibodies and proteins that protect us from infections and regulate our immune system.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，符合参考释义。
matched_points: 正确表达“此外/除此之外”的递进补充含义
与例句中的连接作用一致
